financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Microsoft Corporation develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide. The Productivity and Business Processes segment offers Microsoft 365 commercial, enterprise mobility + security, windows commercial, power BI, exchange, sharepoint, Microsoft teams, security and compliance, and copilot; Microsoft 365 commercial products, such as Windows commercial on-premises and office licensed services; Microsoft 365 consumer products and cloud services, including Microsoft 365 consumer subscriptions, office licensed on-premises,...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Microsoft's revenue was $281.72 billion, an increase of 14.93% compared to the previous year's $245.12 billion. Earnings were $101.83 billion, an increase of 15.54%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 56 analysts, the average rating for MSFT stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $561.11, which is an increase of 59.03% from the latest price.

data.title: Microsoft or Alphabet: Billionaire Steve Cohen Pounds the Table on One ‘Magnificent 7’ Stock
data.text: For the past several years, the Magnificent Seven stocks seemed almost unstoppable. This year, however, the group has collectively fallen about 8%, even as the S&P 500 has advanced 9%.

data.title: The New York Times Amends Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Microsoft

data.title: EU says Amazon, Microsoft cloud services should face stricter rules
data.text: The EU said Thursday that the cloud services of Amazon and Microsoft should face tougher digital competition rules in Europe because of their dominant position in the sector.
